summary: Iteration 12 - Complete Cart System Testing: All cart functionality verified working. Homepage Flagship cards have both CART and ENROLL NOW buttons. Cart icon with badge in header. CartPage with multi-program participant management. CartCheckoutPage with 3-step flow (Promo → Billing+OTP → Pay). EnrollmentPage with 4-step split-screen layout. Promo codes NY2026 and EARLY50 work. Cart persists in localStorage. All 14 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: CartContext.js correctly implements localStorage persistence with key 'divine_iris_cart'
Header.jsx has cart icon with data-testid='cart-icon-btn' and badge with data-testid='cart-count-badge'
ProgramsSection.jsx shows both CART and ENROLL NOW buttons for each program card
UpcomingProgramsSection.jsx has cart button alongside Know More and Enroll Now buttons
CartPage.jsx implements multi-program cart with expandable participant sections
CartCheckoutPage.jsx implements 3-step checkout: Promo → Billing+OTP → Pay
EnrollmentPage.jsx implements 4-step split-screen: Participants → Review+Promo → Billing+OTP → Pay
Phone OTP is MOCKED - mock_otp returned in API response for testing
seed_data_creation: Using existing programs. Cart data stored in localStorage with key 'divine_iris_cart'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All cart system features verified. Cart icon in header shows item count badge. Homepage Flagship cards have CART + ENROLL buttons. Upcoming Programs have cart button + Know More + Enroll. Cart persists in localStorage after page reload. CartCheckoutPage has 3-step flow with promo code support. EnrollmentPage has 4-step split-screen layout. Phone OTP is MOCKED (mock_otp returned in API).

mocked_features.phone_otp: MOCKED - OTP generated server-side, returned in API response field 'mock_otp' for testing

cart_icon_header.icon_present: PASS - Cart icon (ShoppingCart) in header with data-testid='cart-icon-btn'
cart_icon_header.badge_count: PASS - Badge shows item count with data-testid='cart-count-badge'
cart_icon_header.navigation: PASS - Clicking cart icon navigates to /cart

cart_page.title: PASS - Shows 'Your Cart' heading
cart_page.cart_items: PASS - Shows all added programs with image, title, tier, price
cart_page.participant_form: PASS - Each item has expandable participant section
cart_page.proceed_checkout: PASS - 'Proceed to Checkout' button validates and navigates

cart_checkout_page.step0_promo: PASS - Promo code input with Apply button
cart_checkout_page.step1_otp: PASS - OTP verification flow with mock OTP display
cart_checkout_page.step2_pay: PASS - Confirm & Pay with total, Pay button

enrollment_page_direct.left_panel: PASS - Shows image, title, tier, price breakdown, total
enrollment_page_direct.step_bar: PASS - 4 steps: Participants → Review → Billing → Pay
enrollment_page_direct.step1_review_promo: PASS - Cart summary + Promo code input

upcoming_programs_section.section_present: PASS - Section found with 3 program cards
upcoming_programs_section.cart_button: PASS - Cart icon button present on each card
upcoming_programs_section.know_more_button: PASS - 'Know More' button navigates to program detail
upcoming_programs_section.enroll_button: PASS - 'Enroll Now' button navigates to enrollment

localstorage_persistence.item_structure: PASS - Items include programId, title, image, tier, participants
